'''Fenton Rogers''' (born 4 August 2003) is an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|pr}} for the [[Huddersfield Giants]] in the [[Super League]].

He has previously spent time on loan from [[Huddersfield Giants|Huddersfield]] at the [[Halifax Panthers]], [[Oldham RLFC]] and the [[Bradford Bulls]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]], as well as the [[Rochdale Hornets]] in [[2022 RFL League 1|League 1]].

==Background==
Rogers was born in [[Oldham, Greater Manchester]], England. He is the son of former professional rugby league footballer [[Wes Rogers (rugby league)|Wes Rogers]].<ref>[https://roughyeds.co.uk/2021/08/five-match-ban-for-fenton-rogers/ Five Match Ban for Fenton Rogers]</ref>

He played for Saddleworth Rangers and Lancashire as a junior.<ref>[https://roughyeds.co.uk/2021/08/birthday-boy-rogers-comes-in-on-loan/ Birthday boy Rogers comes in on loan]</ref>

==Playing career==
===Huddersfield Giants===
Rogers came through the Giants' Academy system. He signed a three-year deal in July 2023.<ref>[https://www.giantsrl.com/article/8536/talented-forward-signs-new-deal TALENTED FORWARD SIGNS NEW DEAL]</ref>

===Oldham===
He spent time on loan from [[Huddersfield Giants|Huddersfield]] at [[Oldham RLFC|Oldham]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]].

===Rochdale Hornets===
He spent time on loan from [[Huddersfield Giants|Huddersfield]] at the [[Rochdale Hornets]] in [[2022 RFL League 1|League 1]].

===Halifax Panthers===
He spent time on loan from [[Huddersfield Giants|Huddersfield]] at the [[Halifax Panthers]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]].

===Bradford Bulls===
He spent time on loan from [[Huddersfield Giants|Huddersfield]] at the [[Bradford Bulls]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]].

===London Broncos===
He joined the [[London Broncos]] on loan in 2024.<ref>[https://www.londonbroncosrl.com/fenton-rogers-joins-on-temporary-deal Fenton Rogers joins on temporary deal]</ref>

===Bradford Bulls (loan)===
On 4 April 2024 it was reported that he had signed for [[Bradford Bulls]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on loan<ref>{{cite web|website=Telegraph & Argus|date=4 Apr 2024|accessdate=5 May 2024|author=Harry Williams|title=Huddersfield Giants star Fenton Rogers joins Bradford Bulls|url=https://www.thetelegraphandargus.co.uk/sport/sportlatest/24232650.huddersfield-giants-star-fenton-rogers-joins-bradford-bulls/}}</ref>

===Bradford Bulls (loan)===
On 9 July 2025 it was reported that he had signed for [[Bradford Bulls]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on a third loan stint<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=9 Jul 2025|author=Ben Olawumi|title=Huddersfield Giants forward seals Championship return as loan move confirmed|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/huddersfield-giants-forward-seals-championship-return-as-loan-move-confirmed}}</ref>
